name: OpenIPAHound 12 Support - User Group Host Admin Paths
description: Finds users that reach host SSH and sudo access through FreeIPA group membership.
query:
MATCH p1=(user:IPA_User)-[:IPA_MemberOf*1..3]->(group:IPA_Group)
MATCH p2=(group)-[:IPA_CanSSH]->(host:IPA_Computer)
MATCH p3=(group)-[:IPA_CanSUDO]->(host)
RETURN p1,p2,p3
LIMIT 1000
